summary: Iteration 72 — Validated P0 perf fixes (cohort-library cache, sales dashboard cache warmer) and Fundle Brain AI upgrades (CSV export tool, markdown rendering, new models GPT-5.5/Claude Sonnet 4.6/Claude Opus 4.8/Gemini 3.1 Pro). Backend: 18/18 pytest passing. Frontend: Segment Builder, Sales Dashboard, and Fundle Brain (model selector, CSV download button, markdown table) all verified.

issues: React hydration warning: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <option>' — emitted by the model-selector native <select>. Functionally works, but introduces React hydration warnings on every page render. Wrap the icon/badge inside the <option> in plain text or move to a custom dropdown.

action_items: Optional: fix the <span> inside <option> hydration warning in the Fundle Brain model selector (FundleBrain.jsx) by stripping the badge/icon from <option> children — React renders nothing extra inside native <option> elements anyway.
critical_code_review_comments: Cold path for /api/segments/cohort-library/ measured 4.77s in tests — well under the 8s target but still notable; the TTL cache makes the warm path 0.14s, so user-perceived latency is fine.

/api/dashboard/sales-trend?period=all took 17.25s on the run measured (cold). The 4-min cache warmer should keep this warm; if a user hits it cold, 15-20s is visible. Consider extending the cache warmer interval-overlap or warming on startup explicitly.
AI export download streams correctly with Content-Type text/csv; /api/ai/exports/nonexistent-id returns 404 as expected.
seed_data_creation: AI chat tests created 2 new ai_exports docs and 2 new chat sessions ('give me a csv of all one timers' / 'What is the breakdown of customers by tier?'). Safe to leave; do not delete per request.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend file /app/backend/tests/iteration72_perf_ai_brain_test.py covers: auth, cohort-library cold+warm timings (4.77s/0.14s), cohort-library/counts (loyal_members=800061, one_timer=568982), one_timer preview, sales-dashboard, sales-trend, command-center, kpis, AI suggested-prompts, AI 404 nonexistent export, AI CSV chat (gpt-5.5) including download verification via Range header, AI markdown table chat (claude-sonnet-4-6), and regression on 6 analytics dashboards. AI chat tests cost LLM credits and take ~30-60s each — keep test run scoped. Cache warmer is active so a sequential second run is faster.
rca of the issue: No new RCA — all reviewed P0s already fixed by main agent. Confirmed cohort counts (loyal_members=800061, one_timer=568982) and sales totals (₹676.30Cr) match the expected snapshot.
